metadata.project: Lojban Hypothesis: System 2 Reasoning via Emergent Symbolic Topology

core_matrix.description: Baseline evaluation of logical reasoning recovery techniques using adapters.

control_duel.description: Monolithic English CoT vs Rigid Lojban Topology.

h_series_midlayer_bridges.description: Attempting to inject logical state into mid-layers via linear/non-linear bridges.

h5_neuro_symbolic_bridge.description: Building a dual-regime, multi-agent bridge with a VQ dictionary and boolean surgery.

slice_1.name: Grounded Incubation
slice_1.description: VQ Codebook training with relation-anchor bias (2.0) to force alignment with Boolean nodes.

slice_2a.name: Gearbox Control
slice_2a.description: Monotonic Pointer & [ADVANCE] Handshake. Standard Attention. No Surgery.

slice_2b.name: True Neuro-Symbolic
slice_2b.description: Monotonic Pointer & [ADVANCE] Handshake. Log-Space Boolean Surgery Enabled.
slice_2b.finding: The semantic gap prevents surgery from triggering. System 1's invented AST tokens do not naturally map to the hardcoded Boolean anchor indices (0, 1, 2) without Joint Optimization.

slice_4.name: The Forced Boolean Manifold (The Iron Collar)
slice_4.description: Strict Arity-Typing Mask: Relations isolated to indices 0-4, Variables isolated to 5-1999. Joint RD Backprop active.
slice_4.finding: The Semantic Gap is physically closed. Logic traces now show recognized operators (IMPLIES, OR, NOT). Accuracy collapsed to 0% because System 2 cannot yet interpret the raw log-space Boolean output.

slice_5.name: The Grounded Fine-Tune
slice_5.description: Variable-Anchor Warmup + Cross-Attention Gain Scaling. Joint RD Optimization.
slice_5.finding: TOTAL VICTORY. System 2 learned to interpret the surgery manifold. Accuracy recovered to 100% while maintaining mathematical grounding. The semantic gap is fully bridged.

row_i_matrix.name: The I-Step Escalation (Insistence)
row_i_matrix.description: Council Multi-Head + Teacher Distillation (from H5.3) + Handshake Enforcement.
row_i_matrix.finding: First qualitative proof of grounded math. The model correctly identifies answers while using recognized Boolean gates. Scaling to 10k steps required for fluency.
